overview:
## Return Value

The configured CloudKit object.

## Discussion

For each container that you access, specify the container ID, API token, and environment.

Other [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.ContainerConfig].`apiTokenAuth` keys, such as the `persist` key, are optional. To keep the user signed in after closing and reopening the browser, set `persist` to `true`.

To customize the sign in and sign out buttons, add `signInButton` and `signOutButton` keys to the `auth` dictionary.

For more container and service configuration options, see [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.CloudKitConfig] in [doc://com.apple.cloudkitjs/documentation/CloudKitJS/cloudkit-js-data-types].
title: configure
